evals.prompt: Create a card with a title, description, and a form in the content area.
evals.expected_output: IGRPCard with IGRPCardHeader (IGRPCardTitle, IGRPCardDescription), IGRPCardContent with form.

evals.prompt: Display user profile as a read-only card with name, email, and role fields.
evals.expected_output: IGRPCardDetails with items array for label/content pairs.
